title: AI on Your Device: Secure Data for Sensitive Industries! #shorts
summary: On-device AI processing is presented as a solution for data privacy and efficiency in sensitive industries. The approach supports voice agents, video understanding, and robotics applications while keeping data local rather than cloud-based.
